title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 136.105 - Fees to be deposited in state treasury
text:
136.105.  Fees to be deposited in state treasury. — All fees received by the director of revenue for services to be performed by the secretary of state or the state auditor shall be deposited in the state treasury to the credit of the general revenue fund.
(RSMo 1939 § 13429, A.L. 1947 V. I p. 484, A.L. 1959 H.B. 117 § 30.285)
